# Move And Pack → VCU to VCU Move

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Move And Pack → VCU to VCU Move

VCU to VCU Move

Instruction Type and Width    Instruction description
                              Performs move between two VCUs. The sources is 40-bit wide
VCU to VCU Vector Move        and the destination is either 32-bit or 40-bit wide determined by
                              the vector register type.
